summary: Iteration 195 testing complete: Cinematic Visual Features. All 10 backend regression tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Persistent waveform canvas on /cosmic-map, /mastery-avenues, /encyclopedia. Layer transition with 'ASCENDING TO CELESTIAL REALM' overlay and expanding rings animation. Celestial chart renders after transition. Layer toggle works bidirectionally (Ground ↔ Celestial). Coven panel with three tabs (Coven, Ranks, Avatar) still accessible.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 195 Cinematic Visual Features fully working. (1) PersistentWaveform canvas is mounted globally in App.js and renders at bottom of every page with data-testid='persistent-waveform'. It shows a breathing sine wave when idle and real-time audio waveform when MixerContext is active. (2) Layer transition in CosmicMap.js triggers a 1.2s cinematic overlay with 4 expanding rings and label ('Ascending to Celestial Realm' or 'Returning to Physical Layer'). (3) Haptic ripple effect triggers navigator.vibrate on harvest events. All regression APIs working.

persistent_waveform.active_state: Real-time audio waveform from MixerContext analyser

layer_transition.diving_animation: 4 expanding purple rings + 'Ascending to Celestial Realm' label
layer_transition.ascending_animation: 4 expanding gold rings + 'Returning to Physical Layer' label

haptic_ripple.trigger: Harvest events (ground nodes, power spots, celestial alignment)
